name: io.github.esstipi-debug/linchpin
description: AI-powered supply-chain and inventory optimization: forecasting, ABC-XYZ classification, reorder policies, pricing, financial KPIs, and data-quality audits for autonomous agents. Read-only analysis, per-client API key.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Per-client key issued by the Linchpin operator (contact via https://linchpin.fly.dev) - not a self-serve signup yet.
